side_effects.description: GHK-Cu causes lumps and sting at injection sites. Developing lumps similar to OP's experience.

protocol_notes: Manages GHK-Cu injection site reactions using heat and manual massage. Rotates injection sites by at least 2 centimeters to reduce daily pin damage. Avoids injecting excessive liquid volume at single site. Uses glute injections exclusively to minimize sting and lumps.
